boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: manager transfer update outside approved effective date.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Unresolved effective date and authority dependency
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: org-change effective date and receiving manager authority match unresolved

critical_features_preserved: org-change effective date and receiving manager authority match
final_answer: Source records do not close the manager transfer boundary. The control record says the required effective date and receiving manager authority match are missing, stale, mismatched, expired, or scoped differently. Policy requires exact source closure before execution. Tone, urgency, and prior convenience do not authorize action, so escalate for resolution.
